'''âd-j-m''' ('''kadajam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:orient|orient]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:orient|orient]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-j-m
|-
! Lemma
| kadajam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidajam|thidajam]] || [[word:jidajam|jidajam]] || [[word:shidajam|shidajam]] || [[word:kidajam|kidajam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudajam|thuthudajam]] || [[word:jujudajam|jujudajam]] || [[word:shushudajam|shushudajam]] || [[word:kukudajam|kukudajam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudajam|thudajam]] || [[word:judajam|judajam]] || [[word:shudajam|shudajam]] || [[word:kudajam|kudajam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudajam|thudajam]] || [[word:judajam|judajam]] || [[word:shudajam|shudajam]] || [[word:kudajam|kudajam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedajam|thedajam]] || [[word:jedajam|jedajam]] || [[word:shedajam|shedajam]] || [[word:kedajam|kedajam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodajam|thothodajam]] || [[word:jojodajam|jojodajam]] || [[word:shoshodajam|shoshodajam]] || [[word:kokodajam|kokodajam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodajam|thodajam]] || [[word:jodajam|jodajam]] || [[word:shodajam|shodajam]] || [[word:kodajam|kodajam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodajam|thodajam]] || [[word:jodajam|jodajam]] || [[word:shodajam|shodajam]] || [[word:kodajam|kodajam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdajam|thĂŠdajam]] || [[word:jĂŠdajam|jĂŠdajam]] || [[word:shĂŠdajam|shĂŠdajam]] || [[word:kĂŠdajam|kĂŠdajam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadajam|thathadajam]] || [[word:jajadajam|jajadajam]] || [[word:shashadajam|shashadajam]] || [[word:kakadajam|kakadajam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadajam|thadajam]] || [[word:jadajam|jadajam]] || [[word:shadajam|shadajam]] || [[word:kadajam|kadajam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadajam|thadajam]] || [[word:jadajam|jadajam]] || [[word:shadajam|shadajam]] || [[word:kadajam|kadajam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadajam|shadajam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadajam|goshadajam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadajam|gokishadajam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadajamnĂŒ|shadajamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadajamnknĂŒ|goshadajamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadajamnĂŒ|gokishadajamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadajamshĂ«|shadajamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadajamnkshĂ«|goshadajamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadajamshĂ«|gokishadajamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadajamro|shadajamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadajamnkro|goshadajamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadajamro|gokishadajamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadajamu|shadajamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadajamnkmu|goshadajamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadajamu|gokishadajamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadajamsher|shadajamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadajamnksher|goshadajamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadajamsher|gokishadajamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadajamng|shadajamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadajamnkng|goshadajamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadajamng|gokishadajamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadajamya|shadajamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadajamnkya|goshadajamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadajamya|gokishadajamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadajamyam|shadajamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadajamnkyam|goshadajamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadajamyam|gokishadajamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadajamnĂŒshĂ«|shadajamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadajamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadajamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadajamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadajamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadajamnĂŒro|shadajamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadajamnknĂŒro|goshadajamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadajamnĂŒro|gokishadajamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadajamnĂŒmu|shadajamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadajamnknĂŒmu|goshadajamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadajamnĂŒmu|gokishadajamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadajamshĂ«nĂŒ|shadajamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadajamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadajamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadajamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadajamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadajamshĂ«ro|shadajamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadajamnkshĂ«ro|goshadajamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadajamshĂ«ro|gokishadajamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadajamshĂ«mu|shadajamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadajamnkshĂ«mu|goshadajamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadajamshĂ«mu|gokishadajamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadajamronĂŒ|shadajamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadajamnkronĂŒ|goshadajamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadajamronĂŒ|gokishadajamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadajamroshĂ«|shadajamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadajamnkroshĂ«|goshadajamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadajamroshĂ«|gokishadajamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadajamromu|shadajamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadajamnkromu|goshadajamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadajamromu|gokishadajamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadajamunĂŒ|shadajamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadajamnkmunĂŒ|goshadajamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadajamunĂŒ|gokishadajamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadajamushĂ«|shadajamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadajamnkmushĂ«|goshadajamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadajamushĂ«|gokishadajamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadajamuro|shadajamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadajamnkmuro|goshadajamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadajamuro|gokishadajamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
